mapper.select: SELECT se.evaluation_id, se.order_id, se.staff_id, s.staff_name AS staff_name, se.provider_id, p.provider_name AS provider_name, se.elder_id, e.elder_name AS elder_name, o.service_type_code, o.service_type_name, se.attitude_score, se.quality_score, se.efficiency_score, se.overall_score, se.average_score, se.evaluation_content, se.evaluation_tags, se.is_anonymous, se.evaluation_time, se.create_time FROM t_service_evaluation se LEFT JOIN t_staff s ON se.staff_id = s.staff_id LEFT JOIN t_provider p ON se.provider_id = p.provider_id LEFT JOIN t_elder e ON se.elder_id = e.elder_id LEFT JOIN t_order o ON se.order_id = o.order_id WHERE se.evaluation_id = #{evaluationId} AND se.deleted = 0

SELECT se.evaluation_id, se.order_id, se.staff_id, s.staff_name AS staff_name, se.provider_id, p.provider_name AS provider_name, se.elder_id, e.elder_name AS elder_name, o.service_type_code, o.service_type_name, se.attitude_score, se.quality_score, se.efficiency_score, se.overall_score, se.average_score, se.evaluation_content, se.evaluation_tags, se.is_anonymous, se.evaluation_time, se.reply_content, se.reply_time, se.evaluation_token, se.token_status, se.token_expire_time, se.token_used_time, se.create_time FROM t_service_evaluation se LEFT JOIN t_staff s ON se.staff_id = s.staff_id LEFT JOIN t_provider p ON se.provider_id = p.provider_id LEFT JOIN t_elder e ON se.elder_id = e.elder_id LEFT JOIN t_order o ON se.order_id = o.order_id WHERE se.evaluation_token = #{token}
